title: Guided research drift hotfix
summary: Forge Method now keeps strategic app, stack, and codebase-standard conversations in guided research instead of collapsing them into generic runtime-builder automation.
highlights: Stack/language/interface decisions with signals like long research, study, iteration, native UI options, editor references, agent self-modification references, or Rust codebase standards now route to technical-feasibility research.
Ready projects preserve the 6-evolve route when a research or exploration request opens an evolution cycle.
Performance wording like 'mais rapido e performativo' no longer gets mistaken for a rushed fast-path request.
The parity replay matrix now includes a standalone-app transcript regression fixture.
